data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for service selection and time picking without leaving the app.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for service selection and time picking without leaving the app. However, the evidence provided does not confirm whether this functionality is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this capability, but there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided to support the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of service selection and time picking without leaving the app.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
